name: Billy Meier
description: Eduard 'Billy' Meier is a controversial Swiss UFO contactee who claims to have had regular contact with extraterrestrials from the Pleiades/Plejaren star cluster since the 1940s. Meier claims these extraterrestrials, who are human-like, have provided him with information about the universe, history, and future events. He supports his claims with photographs, films, sound recordings, and metal samples, which he asserts are proof of his encounters. The Meier case is one of the longest-running and most detailed UFO contact claims. Mainstream science and the UFO research community largely dismiss Meier's claims as a hoax, citing inconsistencies, photographic analysis suggesting manipulation, and a lack of verifiable evidence. Critics argue that the purported alien artifacts are of terrestrial origin and that Meier's stories borrow heavily from science fiction and esoteric literature. Despite extensive investigation, no independent verification of Meier's claims has been achieved, and many researchers have pointed out demonstrable errors and exaggerations in his statements. The case continues to be a source of debate and fascination within certain UFO communities.
subtitle: Swiss UFO Contactee Claims

claims.evidence: Photographs, films, sound recordings, metal samples, and personal accounts.
claims.criticism: Photographs and films are analyzed as fakes; metal samples are of terrestrial origin; inconsistencies in Meier's stories.

claims.claim: Plejaren extraterrestrials provided information about the universe, history, and future.
claims.evidence: Meier's published books and articles containing information allegedly received from the extraterrestrials.
claims.criticism: Information is unverifiable and often contradicts established scientific knowledge; similarities to science fiction and esoteric sources.

claims.claim: Meier possesses genuine evidence of extraterrestrial technology.
claims.evidence: Metal samples recovered from alleged crash sites.
claims.criticism: Metal samples are of common terrestrial materials and show no unusual properties; no evidence of extraterrestrial origin.

keyFigures.name: Kal Korff
keyFigures.role: Prominent skeptic and investigator who debunked Meier's claims

keyFigures.name: Wendelle Stevens
keyFigures.role: Early supporter and investigator of the Meier case

timeline.event: Meier claims his first contact with an extraterrestrial named Sfath.
Meier publishes 'Contact Notes', detailing his alleged encounters.
Meier produces photographs and films purportedly showing UFOs.
The Meier case continues to be debated and investigated.

sources.author: Kal Korff
sources.work: The Meier Incident: The Most Infamous Hoax in Ufology
sources.title: Kal Korff

sources.author: Gary Kinder
sources.work: Light Years: An Investigation into the Extraterrestrial Experiences of Eduard Meier
sources.title: Gary Kinder

sources.author: Randi, James
